summary: Added a strict proof-level ladder to automation handoffs, prompts, context templates, and docs so agents must name the highest proof reached and any missing proof instead of making vague verification claims.
validations_passed: python3 -m py_compile automation/supervisor/policy.py automation/supervisor/run_next.py automation/context/build_context.py automation/tests/test_harness.py

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for harness-proof-level-ladder
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff already carried proof_level and missing_proof_levels but predated the broader evidence fields (contract_status_changes, residual_risks, repo_clean_status, git_mirror_status) added by the later owlory-handoff-evidence-writer slice.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; the original proof_level, missing_proof_levels, and dirty_paths_outside_scope set by this slice's author were preserved verbatim.
proof: python3 -m py_compile automation/supervisor/policy.py automation/supervisor/run_next.py automation/context/build_context.py automation/tests/test_harness.py

residual_risks: This slice intentionally does not add the broader handoff evidence fields such as contract_status_changes, repo_clean_status, or git_mirror_status; that belongs in the separate owlory-handoff-evidence-writer slice.
Historical handoffs created before this schema change are preserved as read-only context with legacy-unknown proof until explicitly backfilled.
